title: search_assets: matches carry reason tags and capped object lists
automatedCoverage: compress.test.ts: renderSearchSummary preserves reason tags and caps objects per file
compress.test.ts: compactPath drops Assets/ prefix and normalizes slashes
compress.test.ts: extForKind maps known kinds to extensions

steps.title: Prerequisites
steps.body: Bridge running. Optional, automated-covered quantitative check: confirm `unity_open_mcp_search_assets` tags why each file matched and caps the per-file object list. The reason-tag rendering + object capping is asserted by the automated test below; this scenario is a runnable confidence pass.

steps.title: Search for a component that exists in the demo
Expected outcomes
items: matches array; each entry has path (Assets/ prefix dropped), kind, and reasons (including component and/or gameobject)
a capped objects list per file, with moreObjectsHidden when the cap is hit
an ext table maps each kind to its extension

reset.note: search_assets is read-only; no fixture is staged and nothing is reverted on disk.
